case_title: LUBBOCK TEACHERS FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS. MANUEL YOUNG

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUBBOCK TEACHERS FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOUNG, MANUEL $10,388.66 PRINCIPAL, $69.26 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,827.92, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUBBOCK TEACHERS FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, MANUEL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
POS ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR OF NTC OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT; JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 1710.25; FINAL JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUBBOCK TEACHERS FEDERAL CREDIT UNION
